title: Dpa
description: An array of objects to contain DPA registration details.

supportedCardBrands.description: Card networks that are supported for DPA registration. The following networks are supported: MASTERCARD, VISA, DISCOVER, AMEX.

debitTokenRequested.description:
A flag for the Integrator to indicate that they would not like to have their Cardholder's debit cards tokenized.

Conditional: Must be set to true when the Digital Payment Application (DPA) processes in the United States (US)"'

supportedCheckoutTypes.description: List of checkout types to be supported by the DPA. These include CLICK_TO_PAY, GUEST_CHECKOUT_TOKENIZATION and CARD_ON_FILE_TOKENIZATION.
